)

fixed.sql:
WITH max_date AS (
  SELECT max(date) AS dt FROM sales_daily
),
forecast_agg AS (
  SELECT sku_id, sum(yhat) AS forecast_units
  FROM forecast_daily, max_date
  WHERE date > max_date.dt AND model_name = 'lightgbm'
  GROUP BY sku_id
),
recent_sales AS (
  SELECT sku_id, sum(units_sold) AS actual_units
  FROM sales_daily, max_date
  WHERE date >= max_date.dt - 27 AND date <= max_date.dt
  GROUP BY sku_id
)
SELECT p.sku_id, p.product_name,
       f.forecast_units,
       COALESCE(s.actual_units, 0) AS actual_units
FROM forecast_agg f
JOIN products p USING (sku_id)
LEFT JOIN recent_sales s USING (sku_id)
ORDER BY f.forecast_units DESC
LIMIT 5

rag.sql:
WITH top_skus AS (
    SELECT sku_id, SUM(yhat) AS forecast_units
    FROM forecast_daily
    WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
    GROUP BY sku_id
    ORDER BY forecast_units DESC, sku_id
    LIMIT 5
),
actual_sales AS (
    SELECT sku_id, SUM(units_sold) AS actual_units
    FROM sales_daily
    WHERE date > (SELECT MAX(date) FROM sales_daily) - INTERVAL 28 DAY
    GROUP BY sku_id
)
SELECT t.sku_id, p.product_name, t.forecast_units, COALESCE(a.actual_units, 0) AS actual_units
FROM top_skus t
JOIN products p ON t.sku_id = p.sku_id
LEFT JOIN actual_sales a ON t.sku_id = a.sku_id
ORDER BY t.forecast_units DESC, t.sku_id

FROM products p
INNER JOIN bom b ON p.sku_id = b.sku_id
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT mr.material_pn
    FROM material_risk mr
    WHERE mr.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
      AND mr.risk_level = 'RED'
      AND mr.material_pn IN (
          SELECT ss.material_pn
          FROM supply_split ss
          GROUP BY ss.material_pn
          HAVING COUNT(ss.supplier_id) = 1
      )
) risky_single ON b.material_pn = risky_single.material_pn
ORDER BY p.sku_id

fixed.sql:
WITH mat_sku_count AS (
  SELECT material_pn, count(DISTINCT sku_id) AS sku_count
  FROM bom
  GROUP BY material_pn
),
max_count AS (
  SELECT max(sku_count) AS max_sku FROM mat_sku_count
)
SELECT b.material_pn, m.material_name, mc.sku_count, b.sku_id, p.product_name
FROM bom b
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
JOIN products p USING (sku_id)
JOIN mat_sku_count mc ON b.material_pn = mc.material_pn
CROSS JOIN max_count
WHERE mc.sku_count = max_count.max_sku
ORDER BY b.material_pn, b.sku_id

rag.sql:
WITH sku_count AS (
    SELECT material_pn, count(DISTINCT sku_id) AS cnt
    FROM bom
    GROUP BY material_pn
),
max_cnt AS (
    SELECT max(cnt) AS max_cnt FROM sku_count
)
SELECT b.material_pn, b.sku_id
FROM bom b
WHERE b.material_pn IN (
    SELECT material_pn FROM sku_count, max_cnt WHERE sku_count.cnt = max_cnt.max_cnt
)
ORDER BY b.material_pn, b.sku_id

fixed.sql:
WITH today AS (
  SELECT max(date) AS dt FROM sales_daily
)
SELECT
  (SELECT sum(units_sold) FROM sales_daily
   WHERE date >= (SELECT dt FROM today) - INTERVAL 27 DAY
     AND date <= (SELECT dt FROM today)) AS actual_units,
  (SELECT sum(yhat) FROM forecast_daily
   WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
     AND date > (SELECT dt FROM today)
     AND date <= (SELECT dt FROM today) + INTERVAL 28 DAY) AS forecast_units

  (SELECT sum(units_sold) FROM sales_daily WHERE date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily) - INTERVAL 28 DAY AND date <= (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)) AS actual_total

WITH latest_price AS (
  SELECT sku_id, sell_price
  FROM (
    SELECT sku_id, week_start, sell_price,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sku_id ORDER BY week_start DESC) AS rn
    FROM prices
  ) t
  WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT p.sku_id, p.product_name, l.sell_price
FROM latest_price l
JOIN products p USING (sku_id)
ORDER BY l.sell_price DESC, p.sku_id
LIMIT 5

rag.sql: SELECT risk_level, COUNT(*) AS material_count FROM material_risk WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk) GROUP BY risk_level ORDER BY CASE risk_level WHEN 'RED' THEN 1 WHEN 'ORANGE' THEN 2 WHEN 'YELLOW' THEN 3 WHEN 'GREEN' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

WITH today AS (SELECT max(date) AS today_date FROM sales_daily)
SELECT mr.material_pn,
       mr.gap_date,
       mr.gap_qty,
       mr.doi_days,
       mr.risk_level,
       mr.risk_reasons,
       mr.gap_date - t.today_date AS days_remaining
FROM material_risk mr, today t
WHERE mr.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND mr.gap_qty > 0
ORDER BY mr.gap_date
